send_no.text: ที่ สอ.กทม.

root.sql: select '!send_no!' as send_no, ( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ||' ('||sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no||')' ) as name, (decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no,null,'','เลขที่ '||sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no) ||decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.moo,null,'','หมู่ '||sc_mem_m_member_address.moo) ||decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.road,null,'',' ถ.'||sc_mem_m_member_address.road) ||decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.soi,null,'',' ซ.'||sc_mem_m_member_address.soi) ) as address1, (decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol,null,'',decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code,'10','แขวง','ต.')||sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol) ||decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name,null,'',decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code,'10',' เขต',' อ.')||sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name) ||decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name,null,'',decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code,'10',' ',' จ.')||sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name) ) as address2, sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode as address3 from sc_mem_m_member_address, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_province, sc_mem_m_ucf_district where 1=1 and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) --and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '012121' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '1' /*WHERE*/
